name: Google Calendar
description: List calendars available to a Google user, browse events within a time range, and retrieve one event by its Calendar identifier.

auth.hint: Enable Google Calendar API in a Google Cloud project, complete OAuth 2.0 consent, and provide an access token with calendar.readonly (or the narrower calendarlist.readonly plus events.readonly scopes).

tools.name: list_calendars
tools.description: List calendars on the authorized user's Google Calendar list.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum calendar entries per page; defaults to 100 and cannot exceed 250.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token selecting a subsequent result page.

params.name: showHidden
params.description: Whether hidden calendar-list entries should be returned; defaults to false.

tools.name: list_events
tools.description: List events from a Google calendar with optional time-window and pagination controls.

params.name: calendarId
params.description: Calendar identifier returned by list_calendars, or primary for the authorized user's primary calendar.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum events per page; defaults to 250 and cannot exceed 2500.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token from nextPageToken selecting a subsequent event page.

params.name: timeMin
params.description: Exclusive RFC 3339 lower bound for an event's end time, including a time-zone offset.

params.name: timeMax
params.description: Exclusive RFC 3339 upper bound for an event's start time, including a time-zone offset.

params.name: iCalUID
params.description: Return events matching this iCalendar UID.

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Retrieve one event from a Google calendar by its Calendar event identifier.

params.name: calendarId
params.description: Calendar identifier, or primary for the authorized user's primary calendar.

params.name: eventId
params.description: Google Calendar event identifier; use list_events with iCalUID when starting from an iCalendar UID.

params.name: maxAttendees
params.description: Maximum attendees to include in the event response.

params.name: timeZone
params.description: IANA time zone used in the response; defaults to the calendar's time zone.
